var.label: V_DESCRGRUPO
var.expression: SELECT DESCRGRUPOPROD FROM TGFGRU WHERE CODGRUPOPROD = :A_CODGRUPOPROD

var.label: V_DESCROPER
var.expression: SELECT MAX(DESCROPER) FROM TGFTOP WHERE CODTIPOPER = :A_CODTIPOPER

grid.title: Financeiro
grid.expression: SELECT CASE WHEN F.RECDESP = 1 THEN 'CONTAS A RECEBER' WHEN F.RECDESP = -1 THEN 'CONTAS A PAGAR' WHEN F.RECDESP = 0 THEN 'ERRO' ELSE 'OUTROS' END AS TIPO_CONTA, COUNT(*) AS QTD_REGISTROS FROM TGFFIN F GROUP BY CASE WHEN F.RECDESP = 1 THEN 'CONTAS A RECEBER' WHEN F.RECDESP = -1 THEN 'CONTAS A PAGAR' WHEN F.RECDESP = 0 THEN 'ERRO' ELSE 'OUTROS' END ORDER BY TIPO_CONTA

grid.title: Financeiros: :A_TIPO_CONTA
grid.expression: SELECT F.NUFIN, F.NUNOTA, F.DTVENC, F.VLRDESDOB, CASE WHEN F.RECDESP = 1 THEN 'CONTAS A RECEBER' WHEN F.RECDESP = -1 THEN 'CONTAS A PAGAR' WHEN F.RECDESP = 0 THEN 'ERRO' ELSE 'OUTROS' END AS TIPO_CONTA FROM TGFFIN F WHERE CASE WHEN F.RECDESP = 1 THEN 'CONTAS A RECEBER' WHEN F.RECDESP = -1 THEN 'CONTAS A PAGAR' WHEN F.RECDESP = 0 THEN 'ERRO' ELSE 'OUTROS' END = :A_TIPO_CONTA ORDER BY TIPO_CONTA, F.DTVENC

grid.title: Entradas e Saídas - Tipos Movimento
grid.expression: SELECT C.TIPMOV, CASE WHEN C.TIPMOV = 'Z' THEN 'Z-Modelo' ELSE F_DESCROPC('TGFTOP','TIPMOV',C.TIPMOV) END AS OPCAO, COUNT(*) AS QTD FROM TGFCAB C GROUP BY C.TIPMOV ORDER BY C.TIPMOV

grid.title: Registro por TOPs - Tipo de Movimento: $V_DESCRTIPMOV
grid.expression: SELECT C.TIPMOV, O.OPCAO AS DESC_TIPMOV, C.CODTIPOPER, TOPX.DESCROPER AS DESC_OPERACAO, COUNT(*) AS QTD FROM TGFCAB C JOIN TDDCAM D ON D.NOMETAB = 'TGFCAB' AND D.NOMECAMPO = 'TIPMOV' JOIN TDDOPC O ON O.NUCAMPO = D.NUCAMPO AND O.VALOR = C.TIPMOV LEFT JOIN ( SELECT T.CODTIPOPER, T.DESCROPER, T.DHALTER FROM TGFTOP T JOIN ( SELECT CODTIPOPER, MAX(DHALTER) AS MAX_DHALTER FROM TGFTOP GROUP BY CODTIPOPER ) M ON M.CODTIPOPER = T.CODTIPOPER AND M.MAX_DHALTER = T.DHALTER ) TOPX ON TOPX.CODTIPOPER = C.CODTIPOPER WHERE C.TIPMOV = :A_TIPMOV GROUP BY C.TIPMOV, O.OPCAO, C.CODTIPOPER, TOPX.DESCROPER ORDER BY C.TIPMOV, QTD DESC, C.CODTIPOPER

grid.title: Registros com a TOP - :A_CODTIPOPER-$V_DESCROPER
grid.expression: SELECT C.NUNOTA, C.CODEMP, C.NUMNOTA, C.SERIENOTA, C.DTNEG, C.TIPMOV, O.OPCAO AS DESC_TIPMOV, C.CODTIPOPER, TOPX.DESCROPER AS DESC_OPERACAO, C.VLRNOTA, C.AD_ORIGDEPLOY FROM TGFCAB C JOIN TDDCAM D ON D.NOMETAB = 'TGFCAB' AND D.NOMECAMPO = 'TIPMOV' JOIN TDDOPC O ON O.NUCAMPO = D.NUCAMPO AND O.VALOR = C.TIPMOV LEFT JOIN ( SELECT T.CODTIPOPER, T.DESCROPER, T.DHALTER FROM TGFTOP T JOIN ( SELECT CODTIPOPER, MAX(DHALTER) AS MAX_DHALTER FROM TGFTOP GROUP BY CODTIPOPER ) M ON M.CODTIPOPER = T.CODTIPOPER AND M.MAX_DHALTER = T.DHALTER ) TOPX ON TOPX.CODTIPOPER = C.CODTIPOPER WHERE C.CODTIPOPER = :A_CODTIPOPER ORDER BY C.DTNEG DESC

grid.title: Produtos por USOPROD
grid.expression: SELECT PRO.USOPROD, CASE WHEN PRO.USOPROD = 'S' THEN 'Serviço' ELSE OPC.OPCAO END AS DESC_USOPROD, COUNT(*) AS QTDE_PRODUTOS FROM TGFPRO PRO LEFT JOIN TDDCAM CAM ON CAM.NOMETAB = 'TGFPRO' AND CAM.NOMECAMPO = 'USOPROD' LEFT JOIN TDDOPC OPC ON OPC.NUCAMPO = CAM.NUCAMPO AND OPC.VALOR = PRO.USOPROD WHERE PRO.CODPROD <> 0 GROUP BY PRO.USOPROD, OPC.OPCAO ORDER BY PRO.USOPROD

grid.title: Produtos - Uso Produto: $V_DESCRUSOPROD
grid.expression: SELECT PRO.CODPROD, PRO.DESCRPROD, PRO.CODVOL, VOL.DESCRVOL, PRO.USOPROD, PRO.DECVLR, PRO.DECQTD, PRO.DESCMAX, F_DESCROPC('TGFPRO','TEMICMS',PRO.TEMICMS) AS TEMICMS, F_DESCROPC('TGFPRO','TEMISS',PRO.TEMISS) AS TEMISS, F_DESCROPC('TGFPRO','TEMIPIVENDA',PRO.TEMIPIVENDA) AS TEMIPIVENDA, F_DESCROPC('TGFPRO','TEMIPICOMPRA',PRO.TEMIPICOMPRA) AS TEMIPICOMPRA, F_DESCROPC('TGFPRO','TEMIRF',PRO.TEMIRF) AS TEMIRF, PRO.PERCIRF, F_DESCROPC('TGFPRO','TEMINSS',PRO.TEMINSS) AS TEMINSS, PRO.REFERENCIA, PRO.CODGRUPOPROD, PRO.AD_ORIGDEPLOY FROM TGFPRO PRO JOIN TGFVOL VOL ON PRO.CODVOL = VOL.CODVOL WHERE PRO.USOPROD = :A_USOPROD

grid.title: Produtos por Grupo de Produtos
grid.expression: SELECT PRO.CODGRUPOPROD, GRU.DESCRGRUPOPROD, PRO.USOPROD, CASE WHEN PRO.USOPROD = 'S' THEN 'Serviço' ELSE NVL(OPC.OPCAO, 'Outro (' || PRO.USOPROD || ')') END AS DESC_USOPROD, COUNT(*) AS QTDE_PRODUTOS FROM TGFPRO PRO INNER JOIN TGFGRU GRU ON PRO.CODGRUPOPROD = GRU.CODGRUPOPROD LEFT JOIN TDDCAM CAM ON CAM.NOMETAB = 'TGFPRO' AND CAM.NOMECAMPO = 'USOPROD' LEFT JOIN TDDOPC OPC ON OPC.NUCAMPO = CAM.NUCAMPO AND OPC.VALOR = PRO.USOPROD WHERE PRO.CODPROD <> 0 GROUP BY PRO.CODGRUPOPROD, GRU.DESCRGRUPOPROD, PRO.USOPROD, OPC.OPCAO ORDER BY PRO.CODGRUPOPROD, PRO.USOPROD

grid.title: Produtos do grupo :A_CODGRUPOPROD-$V_DESCRGRUPO - Uso: $V_DESCRUSOPROD
grid.expression: SELECT PRO.CODPROD, PRO.DESCRPROD, PRO.CODVOL, VOL.DESCRVOL, PRO.USOPROD, PRO.DECVLR, PRO.DECQTD, PRO.DESCMAX, F_DESCROPC('TGFPRO','TEMICMS',PRO.TEMICMS) AS TEMICMS, F_DESCROPC('TGFPRO','TEMISS',PRO.TEMISS) AS TEMISS, F_DESCROPC('TGFPRO','TEMIPIVENDA',PRO.TEMIPIVENDA) AS TEMIPIVENDA, F_DESCROPC('TGFPRO','TEMIPICOMPRA',PRO.TEMIPICOMPRA) AS TEMIPICOMPRA, F_DESCROPC('TGFPRO','TEMIRF',PRO.TEMIRF) AS TEMIRF, PRO.PERCIRF, F_DESCROPC('TGFPRO','TEMINSS',PRO.TEMINSS) AS TEMINSS, PRO.REFERENCIA, PRO.CODGRUPOPROD, PRO.AD_ORIGDEPLOY FROM TGFPRO PRO JOIN TGFVOL VOL ON PRO.CODVOL = VOL.CODVOL WHERE PRO.CODGRUPOPROD = :A_CODGRUPOPROD AND PRO.USOPROD = :A_USOPROD

grid.title: Referências de Produtos Duplicadas
grid.expression: SELECT P.REFERENCIA, COUNT(*) AS QTD_PRODUTOS FROM TGFPRO P WHERE P.REFERENCIA IS NOT NULL GROUP BY P.REFERENCIA HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

grid.title: Produtos com a Referência: :A_REFERENCIA
grid.expression: SELECT P.CODPROD, P.DESCRPROD, P.REFERENCIA, P.AD_ORIGDEPLOY FROM TGFPRO P WHERE P.REFERENCIA = :A_REFERENCIA ORDER BY P.REFERENCIA, P.CODPROD

grid.title: Descrições de Produtos Duplicadas
grid.expression: SELECT NCM, DESCRPROD, F_DESCROPC('TGFPRO','ORIGPROD',ORIGPROD) DESCRORIGPROD, ORIGPROD, COUNT(1) AS QTD_PRODUTOS FROM TGFPRO GROUP BY NCM, DESCRPROD, ORIGPROD HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY DESCRPROD

grid.title: Descrição: :A_DESCRPROD - NCM: :A_NCM - Origem: $V_DESCRORIGPROD
grid.expression: SELECT CODPROD, DESCRPROD, NCM, F_DESCROPC('TGFPRO','ORIGPROD',ORIGPROD) AS DESCRORIGPROD, MARCA, REFFORN, REFERENCIA, AD_IDEXTERNO, AD_ORIGDEPLOY FROM TGFPRO WHERE DESCRPROD = :A_DESCRPROD AND NCM = :A_NCM AND ORIGPROD = :A_ORIGPROD

grid.title: Parceiros com CNPJ/CPF Repetidos
grid.expression: SELECT Formatar_Cpf_Cnpj(PAR.CGC_CPF) AS CGF_CPF, PAR.CODPARC, PAR.AD_IDEXTERNO, PAR.RAZAOSOCIAL, PAR.NOMEPARC, PAR.IDENTINSCESTAD, PAR.CODCID, CID.NOMECID, PAR.CODEND, END.NOMEEND, PAR.NUMEND, PAR.CODBAI, BAI.NOMEBAI, PAR.CEP, PAR.COMPLEMENTO, F_DESCROPC('TGFPAR','CLIENTE',PAR.CLIENTE) AS CLIENTE, F_DESCROPC('TGFPAR','FORNECEDOR',PAR.FORNECEDOR) AS FORNECEDOR, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TGFCAB CAB WHERE CAB.CODPARC = PAR.CODPARC ) AS QTD_TGFCAB, PAR.DTALTER FROM TGFPAR PAR INNER JOIN TSIEND END ON (PAR.CODEND = END.CODEND) INNER JOIN TSIBAI BAI ON (PAR.CODBAI = BAI.CODBAI) INNER JOIN TSICID CID ON (PAR.CODCID = CID.CODCID) WHERE PAR.CGC_CPF IS NOT NULL AND PAR.CGC_CPF IN ( SELECT CGC_CPF FROM TGFPAR WHERE CGC_CPF IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CGC_CPF HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) ORDER BY PAR.CGC_CPF

grid.title: Financeiros sem Nota
grid.expression: SELECT DISTINCT f.nufin, f.NUNOTA, f.codtipoper, (select max(descroper) from tgftop where codtipoper = f.codtipoper) as descroper FROM TGFFIN f WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TGFCAB c WHERE c.NUNOTA = f.NUNOTA ) ORDER BY f.nufin, f.NUNOTA

grid.title: Notas sem Financeiro - Por Tipo de Movimento
grid.expression: SELECT CAB.TIPMOV, TIPMOV_DESC.OPCAO AS DESC_TIPMOV, COUNT(*) AS QTD_REGISTROS FROM TGFCAB CAB LEFT JOIN TDDCAM CAM_TIPMOV ON CAM_TIPMOV.NOMETAB = 'TGFCAB' AND CAM_TIPMOV.NOMECAMPO = 'TIPMOV' LEFT JOIN TDDOPC TIPMOV_DESC ON TIPMOV_DESC.NUCAMPO = CAM_TIPMOV.NUCAMPO AND TIPMOV_DESC.VALOR = CAB.TIPMOV WHERE CAB.NUNOTA IN ( SELECT DISTINCT C.NUNOTA FROM TGFCAB C INNER JOIN TGFTOP T ON (C.CODTIPOPER = T.CODTIPOPER AND C.DHTIPOPER = T.DHALTER) WHERE T.ATUALFIN <> 0 AND C.TIPMOV <> 'Z' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TGFFIN F WHERE F.NUNOTA = C.NUNOTA ) ) GROUP BY CAB.TIPMOV, TIPMOV_DESC.OPCAO ORDER BY QTD_REGISTROS DESC

grid.title: TOPs Tipo de Movimento - $V_DESCRTIPMOV
grid.expression:
SELECT CAB.TIPMOV, TIPMOV_DESC.OPCAO AS DESC_TIPMOV, CAB.CODTIPOPER, TOPS.DESCROPER, COUNT(*) AS QTD_REGISTROS FROM TGFCAB CAB JOIN ( SELECT T.CODTIPOPER, T.DESCROPER FROM TGFTOP T JOIN ( SELECT CODTIPOPER, MAX(DHALTER) AS MAX_DHALTER FROM TGFTOP GROUP BY CODTIPOPER ) M ON M.CODTIPOPER = T.CODTIPOPER AND M.MAX_DHALTER = T.DHALTER ) TOPS ON TOPS.CODTIPOPER = CAB.CODTIPOPER LEFT JOIN TDDCAM CAM_TIPMOV ON CAM_TIPMOV.NOMETAB = 'TGFCAB' AND CAM_TIPMOV.NOMECAMPO = 'TIPMOV' LEFT JOIN TDDOPC TIPMOV_DESC ON TIPMOV_DESC.NUCAMPO = CAM_TIPMOV.NUCAMPO AND TIPMOV_DESC.VALOR = CAB.TIPMOV
WHERE CAB.TIPMOV = :A_TIPMOV AND CAB.NUNOTA IN ( SELECT DISTINCT C.NUNOTA FROM TGFCAB C INNER JOIN TGFTOP T ON (C.CODTIPOPER = T.CODTIPOPER AND C.DHTIPOPER = T.DHALTER) WHERE T.ATUALFIN <> 0 AND C.TIPMOV <> 'Z' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TGFFIN F WHERE F.NUNOTA = C.NUNOTA ) ) GROUP BY CAB.TIPMOV, TIPMOV_DESC.OPCAO, CAB.CODTIPOPER, TOPS.DESCROPER ORDER BY QTD_REGISTROS DESC

grid.title: Notas com a TOP :A_CODTIPOPER-$V_DESCROPER
grid.expression:
SELECT CAB.NUNOTA, CAB.CODTIPOPER, TOPS.DESCROPER,
TOPS.CODCFO_ENTRADA, CFO_E.DESCRCFO AS DESC_CODCFO_ENTRADA,
TOPS.CODCFO_SAIDA, CFO_S.DESCRCFO AS DESC_CODCFO_SAIDA,
TOPS.CODCFO_ENTRADA_FORA, CFO_EF.DESCRCFO AS DESC_CODCFO_ENTRADA_FORA,
TOPS.CODCFO_SAIDA_FORA, CFO_SF.DESCRCFO AS DESC_CODCFO_SAIDA_FORA
FROM TGFCAB CAB JOIN ( SELECT T.CODTIPOPER, T.DESCROPER, T.CODCFO_ENTRADA, T.CODCFO_SAIDA, T.CODCFO_ENTRADA_FORA, T.CODCFO_SAIDA_FORA FROM TGFTOP T JOIN ( SELECT CODTIPOPER, MAX(DHALTER) AS MAX_DHALTER FROM TGFTOP GROUP BY CODTIPOPER ) M ON M.CODTIPOPER = T.CODTIPOPER AND M.MAX_DHALTER = T.DHALTER ) TOPS ON TOPS.CODTIPOPER = CAB.CODTIPOPER LEFT JOIN TGFCFO CFO_E ON CFO_E.CODCFO = TOPS.CODCFO_ENTRADA LEFT JOIN TGFCFO CFO_S ON CFO_S.CODCFO = TOPS.CODCFO_SAIDA LEFT JOIN TGFCFO CFO_EF ON CFO_EF.CODCFO = TOPS.CODCFO_ENTRADA_FORA LEFT JOIN TGFCFO CFO_SF ON CFO_SF.CODCFO = TOPS.CODCFO_SAIDA_FORA
WHERE CAB.CODTIPOPER = :A_CODTIPOPER AND CAB.NUNOTA IN ( SELECT DISTINCT C.NUNOTA FROM TGFCAB C WHERE C.TIPMOV <> 'Z' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TGFFIN F WHERE F.NUNOTA = C.NUNOTA ) ) ORDER BY CAB.CODTIPOPER

grid.title: Produtos Vendidos sem Registro de Entrada
grid.expression:
SELECT DISTINCT I.CODPROD, P.DESCRPROD, P.USOPROD AS USOPROD_PRO, OPC_P.OPCAO AS DESC_USOPROD_PRO, I.USOPROD AS USOPROD_ITE, OPC_I.OPCAO AS DESC_USOPROD_ITE, P.NCM, P.AD_ORIGDEPLOY FROM TGFITE I JOIN TGFCAB C ON C.NUNOTA = I.NUNOTA JOIN TGFPRO P ON P.CODPROD = I.CODPROD LEFT JOIN TDDCAM CAM_P ON CAM_P.NOMETAB = 'TGFPRO' AND CAM_P.NOMECAMPO = 'USOPROD' LEFT JOIN TDDOPC OPC_P ON OPC_P.NUCAMPO = CAM_P.NUCAMPO AND OPC_P.VALOR = P.USOPROD
-- descrição do USOPROD do item LEFT JOIN TDDCAM CAM_I ON CAM_I.NOMETAB = 'TGFITE' AND CAM_I.NOMECAMPO = 'USOPROD' LEFT JOIN TDDOPC OPC_I ON OPC_I.NUCAMPO = CAM_I.NUCAMPO AND OPC_I.VALOR = I.USOPROD
WHERE C.TIPMOV = 'V' AND I.CODPROD NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT IC.CODPROD FROM TGFITE IC INNER JOIN TGFCAB CC ON CC.NUNOTA = IC.NUNOTA AND CC.TIPMOV = 'C') ORDER BY P.NCM, I.CODPROD

grid.title: Produtos com Custo Zero
grid.expression: SELECT C.CODEMP, P.CODPROD, MAX(C.DTATUAL) AS ULTIMA_ALTERACAO, MAX(C.CUSSEMICM) AS MAIOR_CUSTO, P.USOPROD, P.AD_ORIGDEPLOY, OPC.OPCAO AS DESC_USOPROD, 'CUSTO IGUAL A ZERO' AS SITUACAO FROM TGFPRO P INNER JOIN TGFCUS C ON C.CODPROD = P.CODPROD LEFT JOIN TDDCAM CAM ON (CAM.NOMETAB = 'TGFPRO' AND CAM.NOMECAMPO = 'USOPROD') LEFT JOIN TDDOPC OPC ON (OPC.NUCAMPO = CAM.NUCAMPO AND OPC.VALOR = P.USOPROD) WHERE P.USOPROD IN ('V', 'R') AND C.DTATUAL <> TO_DATE('01/01/1900', 'DD/MM/YYYY') GROUP BY C.CODEMP, P.CODPROD, P.USOPROD, P.AD_ORIGDEPLOY, OPC.OPCAO HAVING MAX(C.CUSSEMICM) = 0 ORDER BY C.CODEMP, P.CODPROD

SELECT I.NUNOTA, C.CODTIPOPER, I.CODPROD, NVL(I.VLRUNIT, 0) AS VLRUNIT, NVL(I.QTDNEG, 0) AS QTDNEG, NVL(I.BASEICMS, 0) AS BASEICMS, NVL(I.VLRICMS, 0) AS VLRICMS, NVL(I.BASEIPI, 0) AS BASEIPI, -- Removi a duplicidade do VLRICMS que estava na sua query original NVL(I.CODCFO, 0) AS CODCFO, NVL(I.VLRTOT, 0) AS VLRTOT, NVL(C.OBSERVACAO, ' ') AS OBSERVACAO -- Campos de texto costumam ser os maiores vilões FROM TGFITE I JOIN TGFCAB C ON C.NUNOTA = I.NUNOTA WHERE I.CODPROD = :A_CODPROD

grid.title: Produtos sem Custo
grid.expression: SELECT P.CODPROD, P.DESCRPROD, P.USOPROD, MAX(OPC.OPCAO) AS DESC_USOPROD, -- Usando MAX para simplificar o GROUP BY 'SEM REGISTRO NA TGFCUS' AS SITUACAO, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TGFITE I WHERE I.CODPROD = P.CODPROD) THEN 'COM REGISTRO NA TGFITE' ELSE 'SEM REGISTRO NA TGFITE' END AS SITUACAO2, LISTAGG(DISTINCT CAB.TIPMOV, ' | ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CAB.TIPMOV) AS MOVIMENTOS, P.AD_ORIGDEPLOY FROM TGFPRO P -- Joins de Movimentação LEFT JOIN TGFITE I2 ON I2.CODPROD = P.CODPROD LEFT JOIN TGFCAB CAB ON CAB.NUNOTA = I2.NUNOTA -- O segredo: filtrar a TOP no ON do Join para não "quebrar" o Left Join LEFT JOIN TGFTOP TPO ON TPO.CODTIPOPER = CAB.CODTIPOPER AND TPO.DHALTER = CAB.DHTIPOPER AND (TPO.PRECIFICA <> 'N') -- Join de Custo LEFT JOIN TGFCUS CUS ON CUS.CODPROD = P.CODPROD -- Dicionário de Dados LEFT JOIN TDDCAM CAM ON CAM.NOMETAB = 'TGFPRO' AND CAM.NOMECAMPO = 'USOPROD' LEFT JOIN TDDOPC OPC ON OPC.NUCAMPO = CAM.NUCAMPO AND OPC.VALOR = P.USOPROD WHERE CUS.CODPROD IS NULL -- Filtro mestre: Produto sem custo AND P.USOPROD IN ('V', 'R') AND P.CODPROD <> 0 GROUP BY P.CODPROD, P.DESCRPROD, P.USOPROD, P.AD_ORIGDEPLOY ORDER BY P.CODPROD

grid.title: Itens Sem Cabeçalho de Nota
grid.expression: SELECT I.NUNOTA, I.CODEMP, I.CODPROD, P.DESCRPROD, P.AD_ORIGDEPLOY FROM TGFITE i INNER JOIN TGFPRO P ON (I.CODPROD = P.CODPROD) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TGFCAB c WHERE c.NUNOTA = i.NUNOTA ) ORDER BY i.NUNOTA

SELECT c.NUNOTA, c.codtipoper, t.descroper, tipmov_desc.OPCAO AS DESC_TIPMOV, C.DTNEG, C.AD_ORIGDEPLOY FROM TGFCAB c INNER JOIN TGFTOP T ON (C.CODTIPOPER = T.CODTIPOPER AND C.DHTIPOPER = T.DHALTER) LEFT JOIN TDDCAM cam_tipmov ON cam_tipmov.NOMETAB = 'TGFCAB' AND cam_tipmov.NOMECAMPO = 'TIPMOV' LEFT JOIN TDDOPC tipmov_desc ON tipmov_desc.NUCAMPO = cam_tipmov.NUCAMPO AND tipmov_desc.VALOR = c.TIPMOV WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TGFITE i WHERE i.NUNOTA = c.NUNOTA ) AND c.TIPMOV <> 'Z' ORDER BY c.NUNOTA

grid.title: Cidades com Códigos Fiscais Duplicados
grid.expression: SELECT CODMUNFIS, COUNT(*) AS QTD, RTRIM( XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT(e, CODCID || ' - ' || NOMECID || ' - ' || UF || ', ') ORDER BY CODCID ).getClobVal(), ', ' ) AS CIDADES FROM TSICID WHERE CODMUNFIS IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CODMUNFIS HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY CODMUNFIS

grid.title: Cidades com Código Fiscal :A_CODMUNFIS
grid.expression: SELECT CID.CODMUNFIS, CID.CODCID, CID.NOMECID, UFS.UF FROM TSICID CID INNER JOIN TSIUFS UFS ON (CID.UF = UFS.CODUF) WHERE CID.CODMUNFIS = :A_CODMUNFIS AND CID.CODMUNFIS IN ( SELECT CODMUNFIS FROM TSICID WHERE CODMUNFIS IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CODMUNFIS HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) ORDER BY CID.CODMUNFIS, CID.CODCID

grid.title: Parceiros com Classificação Fiscal Divergente do Esperado
grid.expression: WITH BASE AS ( SELECT P.CODPARC, P.TIPPESSOA, P.CLASSIFICMS, -- Código esperado (R, P ou C) conforme as regras CASE WHEN (P.TIPPESSOA = 'J' AND P.IDENTINSCESTAD IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(P.IDENTINSCESTAD) <> 'ISENTO') THEN 'R' -- Revendedor WHEN (P.TIPPESSOA = 'F' AND P.IDENTINSCESTAD IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(P.IDENTINSCESTAD) <> 'ISENTO') THEN 'P' -- Produtor Rural WHEN (NVL(P.IDENTINSCESTAD, 'ISENTO') = 'ISENTO') THEN 'C' -- Consumidor Final Não Contribuinte END AS CLASSIFICMS_ESPERADO FROM TGFPAR P ) SELECT B.TIPPESSOA, TIP_DESC.OPCAO AS DESC_TIPPESSOA, COUNT(*) AS QTD_DIVERGENCIAS FROM BASE B -- descrição do TIPPESSOA LEFT JOIN TDDCAM CAM_TIP ON CAM_TIP.NOMETAB = 'TGFPAR' AND CAM_TIP.NOMECAMPO = 'TIPPESSOA' LEFT JOIN TDDOPC TIP_DESC ON TIP_DESC.NUCAMPO = CAM_TIP.NUCAMPO AND TIP_DESC.VALOR = B.TIPPESSOA WHERE B.CLASSIFICMS_ESPERADO IS NOT NULL AND B.CLASSIFICMS <> B.CLASSIFICMS_ESPERADO GROUP BY B.TIPPESSOA,TIP_DESC.OPCAO ORDER BY TIP_DESC.OPCAO

grid.title: Parceiros com divergência
grid.expression: SELECT P.CODPARC, P.RAZAOSOCIAL, P.TIPPESSOA, TIP_DESC.OPCAO AS DESC_TIPPESSOA, -- descrição do TIPPESSOA P.IDENTINSCESTAD, F_DESCROPC('TGFPAR','CLASSIFICMS', P.CLASSIFICMS) AS CLASSIFICMS, CASE WHEN (P.TIPPESSOA = 'J' AND P.IDENTINSCESTAD IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(P.IDENTINSCESTAD) <> 'ISENTO' AND P.CLASSIFICMS <> 'R') THEN 'R-Revendedor' WHEN (P.TIPPESSOA = 'F' AND P.IDENTINSCESTAD IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(P.IDENTINSCESTAD) <> 'ISENTO' AND P.CLASSIFICMS <> 'P') THEN 'P-Produtor Rural' WHEN (NVL(P.IDENTINSCESTAD, 'ISENTO') = 'ISENTO' AND P.CLASSIFICMS <> 'C') THEN 'C-Consumidor Final Não Contribuinte' END AS CLASSIFICMS_ESPERADO FROM TGFPAR P -- descrição do TIPPESSOA LEFT JOIN TDDCAM CAM_TIP ON CAM_TIP.NOMETAB = 'TGFPAR' AND CAM_TIP.NOMECAMPO = 'TIPPESSOA' LEFT JOIN TDDOPC TIP_DESC ON TIP_DESC.NUCAMPO = CAM_TIP.NUCAMPO AND TIP_DESC.VALOR = P.TIPPESSOA WHERE P.TIPPESSOA = :A_TIPPESSOA AND ((P.TIPPESSOA = 'J' AND P.IDENTINSCESTAD IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(P.IDENTINSCESTAD) <> 'ISENTO' AND P.CLASSIFICMS <> 'R') OR (P.TIPPESSOA = 'F' AND P.IDENTINSCESTAD IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(P.IDENTINSCESTAD) <> 'ISENTO' AND P.CLASSIFICMS <> 'P') OR (NVL(P.IDENTINSCESTAD, 'ISENTO') = 'ISENTO' AND P.CLASSIFICMS <> 'C')) ORDER BY P.CODPARC

grid.title: Produtos Vendidos sem Tabela de Preço
grid.expression: SELECT X.CODPROD, X.DESCRPROD, X.USOPROD, X.DESC_USOPROD, X.AD_IDEXTERNO, X.AD_ORIGDEPLOY, LISTAGG(X.CODTIPOPER, ' | ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY X.CODTIPOPER) AS MOVIMENTOS FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT P.CODPROD, P.DESCRPROD, P.USOPROD, OPC.OPCAO AS DESC_USOPROD, P.AD_IDEXTERNO, P.AD_ORIGDEPLOY, C.CODTIPOPER FROM TGFITE I JOIN TGFCAB C ON C.NUNOTA = I.NUNOTA JOIN TGFPRO P ON P.CODPROD = I.CODPROD LEFT JOIN TDDCAM CAM ON CAM.NOMETAB = 'TGFPRO' AND CAM.NOMECAMPO = 'USOPROD' LEFT JOIN TDDOPC OPC ON OPC.NUCAMPO = CAM.NUCAMPO AND OPC.VALOR = P.USOPROD WHERE C.TIPMOV = 'V' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TGFEXC E WHERE E.CODPROD = P.CODPROD) ) X GROUP BY X.CODPROD, X.DESCRPROD, X.USOPROD, X.DESC_USOPROD, X.AD_IDEXTERNO, X.AD_ORIGDEPLOY ORDER BY X.CODPROD

grid.title: Produtos Com Descrições Similares
grid.expression: WITH PROD_HASH AS ( SELECT CODPROD, DESCRPROD, AD_IDEXTERNO, NCM, CODPARCFORN, AD_ORIGDEPLOY, ORA_HASH(UPPER(REGEXP_REPLACE(DESCRPROD, '[^A-Z0-9 ]', '')), 999999) AS HASH_DESCR, UPPER(REGEXP_REPLACE(DESCRPROD, '[^A-Z0-9 ]', '')) AS DESCRNORM, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TGFITE I INNER JOIN TGFCAB C ON (I.NUNOTA = C.NUNOTA) WHERE I.CODPROD = TGFPRO.CODPROD AND C.TIPMOV = 'C') AS QTDCOMPRA, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TGFITE I INNER JOIN TGFCAB C ON (I.NUNOTA = C.NUNOTA) WHERE I.CODPROD = TGFPRO.CODPROD AND C.TIPMOV = 'V') AS QTDVENDA FROM TGFPRO ) SELECT A.CODPROD AS CODPROD_A, B.CODPROD AS CODPROD_B, A.DESCRPROD AS DESCRPROD_A, B.DESCRPROD AS DESCRPROD_B, A.AD_IDEXTERNO AS AD_IDEXTERNO_A, B.AD_IDEXTERNO AS AD_IDEXTERNO_B, A.NCM AS NCM_A, B.NCM AS NCM_B, A.AD_ORIGDEPLOY AS ORIGEM_A, B.AD_ORIGDEPLOY AS ORIGEM_B, A.CODPARCFORN AS CODPARCFORN_A, B.CODPARCFORN AS CODPARCFORN_B, UTL_MATCH.JARO_WINKLER_SIMILARITY(A.DESCRNORM, B.DESCRNORM) AS SIMILARIDADE, CASE WHEN A.QTDCOMPRA > 0 AND A.QTDVENDA > 0 THEN 'CV' WHEN A.QTDCOMPRA > 0 AND A.QTDVENDA = 0 THEN 'C' WHEN A.QTDCOMPRA = 0 AND A.QTDVENDA > 0 THEN 'V' END AS COMPRAVENDA_A, CASE WHEN B.QTDCOMPRA > 0 AND B.QTDVENDA > 0 THEN 'CV' WHEN B.QTDCOMPRA > 0 AND B.QTDVENDA = 0 THEN 'C' WHEN B.QTDCOMPRA = 0 AND B.QTDVENDA > 0 THEN 'V' END AS COMPRAVENDA_B FROM PROD_HASH A JOIN PROD_HASH B ON A.HASH_DESCR = B.HASH_DESCR AND A.CODPROD < B.CODPROD -- garante que não compara consigo mesmo nem repete pares invertidos WHERE UTL_MATCH.JARO_WINKLER_SIMILARITY(A.DESCRNORM, B.DESCRNORM) > 85 ORDER BY SIMILARIDADE DESC

grid.title: CNPJ Matrizes
grid.expression: SELECT p.CODPARC, NVL(p.RAZAOSOCIAL,p.NOMEPARC) AS NOMEPARC, Formatar_Cpf_Cnpj(p.CGC_CPF) AS CNPJ_MATRIZ, SUBSTR(p.CGC_CPF,1,8) AS RAIZ_CNPJ, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TGFPAR f WHERE SUBSTR(f.CGC_CPF,1,8) = SUBSTR(p.CGC_CPF,1,8) AND SUBSTR(f.CGC_CPF,9,4) <> '0001' AND LENGTH(f.CGC_CPF) = 14) AS QTDFILIAIS FROM TGFPAR p WHERE SUBSTR(p.CGC_CPF,9,4) = '0001' /*SOMENTE MATRIZ*/ AND LENGTH(p.CGC_CPF) = 14 /* SOMENTE CNPJ */ AND SUBSTR(p.CGC_CPF,1,8) <> '00000000' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TGFPAR f WHERE SUBSTR(f.CGC_CPF,1,8) = SUBSTR(p.CGC_CPF,1,8) AND SUBSTR(f.CGC_CPF,9,4) <> '0001' AND LENGTH(f.CGC_CPF) = 14 ) ORDER BY p.NOMEPARC

grid.title: Parceiros com CNPJ Raiz :A_RAIZ
grid.expression: SELECT f.CODPARC, NVL(f.RAZAOSOCIAL,f.NOMEPARC) AS NOMEPARC, Formatar_Cpf_Cnpj(f.CGC_CPF) AS CNPJ, SUBSTR(f.CGC_CPF,1,8) AS RAIZ_CNPJ, f.CODPARCMATRIZ FROM TGFPAR f WHERE SUBSTR(f.CGC_CPF,9,4) <> '0001' /*NAO MATRIZ*/ AND LENGTH(f.CGC_CPF) = 14 /* SOMENTE CNPJ */ AND SUBSTR(f.CGC_CPF,1,8) = :A_RAIZ ORDER BY f.NOMEPARC

grid.title: Produtos Comprados sem Registro de Saída
grid.expression:
SELECT DISTINCT I.CODPROD, P.DESCRPROD, P.USOPROD AS USOPROD_PRO, OPC_P.OPCAO AS DESC_USOPROD_PRO, I.USOPROD AS USOPROD_ITE, OPC_I.OPCAO AS DESC_USOPROD_ITE, P.NCM, P.AD_ORIGDEPLOY FROM TGFITE I JOIN TGFCAB C ON C.NUNOTA = I.NUNOTA JOIN TGFPRO P ON P.CODPROD = I.CODPROD LEFT JOIN TDDCAM CAM_P ON CAM_P.NOMETAB = 'TGFPRO' AND CAM_P.NOMECAMPO = 'USOPROD' LEFT JOIN TDDOPC OPC_P ON OPC_P.NUCAMPO = CAM_P.NUCAMPO AND OPC_P.VALOR = P.USOPROD
-- descrição do USOPROD do item LEFT JOIN TDDCAM CAM_I ON CAM_I.NOMETAB = 'TGFITE' AND CAM_I.NOMECAMPO = 'USOPROD' LEFT JOIN TDDOPC OPC_I ON OPC_I.NUCAMPO = CAM_I.NUCAMPO AND OPC_I.VALOR = I.USOPROD
WHERE C.TIPMOV = 'C' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TGFITE IC JOIN TGFCAB CC ON CC.NUNOTA = IC.NUNOTA AND CC.TIPMOV = 'V' WHERE IC.CODPROD = I.CODPROD ) ORDER BY P.NCM, I.CODPROD

grid.title: Mapa Tributário de Produtos
grid.expression: SELECT * FROM TTKPITI

grid.title: Regras criadas ICMS
Regras criadas PIS/COFINS
grid.expression: SELECT CODEMP, GRUPOIMP, CST, MAX(CASE WHEN NOMEIMP = 'PIS' THEN ALIQ END) AS ALIQ_PIS, MAX(CASE WHEN NOMEIMP = 'COFINS' THEN ALIQ END) AS ALIQ_COFINS FROM TGFIFE WHERE ENTSAI = 'S' AND NOMEIMP IN ('PIS', 'COFINS') GROUP BY CODEMP, GRUPOIMP, CST ORDER BY CST, GRUPOIMP

grid.title: Regras criadas IPI
grid.expression: SELECT PRO.NCM, IPI.PERCENTUAL AS ALIQ_CADASTRADO, PRO.CSTIPISAI AS CST_IPI_CADASTRADO, PITI.ALIQIPI AS ALIQ_MAPEADO, PITI.CSTIPI AS CST_MAPEADO, CASE WHEN IPI.PERCENTUAL <> PITI.ALIQIPI THEN '#FC5B50' -- Faltava o THEN ELSE NULL END AS BKCOLOR FROM TGFPRO PRO INNER JOIN TGFIPI IPI ON IPI.CODIPI = PRO.CODIPI INNER JOIN TTKPITI PITI ON PITI.CODIGO = PRO.AD_IDEXTERNO WHERE PITI.ALIQIPI > 0 GROUP BY PRO.NCM, IPI.PERCENTUAL, PRO.CSTIPISAI, PITI.ALIQIPI, PITI.CSTIPI

grid.title: Produtos da Regra :A_CODRESTRICAO
grid.expression: SELECT CODPROD, DESCRPROD, NCM, GRUPOICMS, GRUPOICMS2 FROM TGFPRO WHERE (:A_TIPRESTRICAO = 'I' AND GRUPOICMS = :A_CODRESTRICAO) OR (:A_TIPRESTRICAO = 'K' AND GRUPOICMS2 = :A_CODRESTRICAO) OR (:A_TIPRESTRICAO = 'H' AND NCM = :A_CODRESTRICAO)

WITH VendasBase AS ( SELECT DISTINCT CODIGO, CPFCNPJORIG, CFOP FROM TTKPITI WHERE CFOP IN (5101, 5102, 5401, 5403, 6101, 6102, 6401, 6403) ) SELECT V1.CODIGO AS COD_PRODUTO, -- Empresa que Produz V1.CPFCNPJORIG AS CNPJ_PRODUCAO, V1.CFOP AS CFOP_PRODUCAO, 'PRODUÇÃO' AS PERFIL_A, -- Empresa que Revende V2.CPFCNPJORIG AS CNPJ_REVENDA, V2.CFOP AS CFOP_REVENDA, 'REVENDA' AS PERFIL_B FROM VendasBase V1 INNER JOIN VendasBase V2 ON V1.CODIGO = V2.CODIGO AND V1.CPFCNPJORIG <> V2.CPFCNPJORIG WHERE ( (V1.CFOP = 5101 AND V2.CFOP = 5102) OR -- Estadual Normal (V1.CFOP = 5401 AND V2.CFOP = 5403) OR -- Estadual ST (V1.CFOP = 6101 AND V2.CFOP = 6102) OR -- Interestadual Normal (V1.CFOP = 6401 AND V2.CFOP = 6403) -- Interestadual ST ) ORDER BY V1.CODIGO

grid.title: Dependentes Duplicados
grid.expression: SELECT F.CODEMP, F.CODFUNC, F.NOMEFUNC AS NOME_FUNCIONARIO, F.CPF AS CPF_FUNCIONARIO, D.NOMEDEPEND AS NOME_DEPENDENTE, D.CPF AS CPF_DEPENDENTE, F.DTADM, F.SITUACAO, F.MATRICULA, D.DTNASC AS DT_NASC_DEPENDENTE FROM TFPFUN F INNER JOIN TFPDPD D ON F.CODEMP = D.CODEMP AND F.CODFUNC = D.CODFUNC WHERE (D.CODEMP, D.CODFUNC, D.CPF) IN ( SELECT DX.CODEMP, DX.CODFUNC, DX.CPF FROM TFPDPD DX GROUP BY DX.CODEMP, DX.CODFUNC, DX.CPF HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 )

grid.title: Dependentes sem CPF
grid.expression: SELECT F.CODEMP, F.CODFUNC, F.NOMEFUNC, F.CPF AS CPF_FUNCIONARIO, F.SITUACAO, D.SEQUENCIA, D.NOMEDEPEND, D.DEPENDIRF, D.DTNASC AS DT_NASC_DEPENDENTE, D.CPF AS CPF_DEPENDENTE FROM TFPDPD D INNER JOIN TFPFUN F ON D.CODEMP = F.CODEMP AND D.CODFUNC = F.CODFUNC WHERE F.SITUACAO IN (1, 5, 6) AND (D.CPF IS NULL OR D.CPF = '' OR D.CPF = '00000000000') ORDER BY F.NOMEFUNC, D.NOMEDEPEND

grid.title: Funcionários Duplicados
grid.expression: SELECT CODEMP, CODFUNC, NOMEFUNC, DTADM, DTDEM, VINCULO, SITUACAO, MATRICULA, MATRICULAOLD, CPF FROM TFPFUN WHERE CPF IN ( SELECT CPF FROM TFPFUN WHERE SITUACAO = 1 GROUP BY CPF HAVING COUNT(CPF) > 1) AND SITUACAO IN (1,5,6) ORDER BY CPF, NOMEFUNC

grid.title: Funcionários Duplicados sem Folha
grid.expression: SELECT F.CODEMP, F.CODFUNC, F.NOMEFUNC, F.CPF, F.VINCULO, F.MATRICULA, F.SITUACAO, F.DTADM, F.DTDEM FROM TFPFUN F LEFT JOIN TFPFOL L ON F.CODEMP = L.CODEMP AND F.CODFUNC = L.CODFUNC WHERE F.CPF IN ( -- Subconsulta para identificar os CPFs com mais de 2 registros ativos SELECT CPF FROM TFPFUN WHERE SITUACAO = 1 GROUP BY CPF HAVING COUNT(CPF) > 1 ) AND F.SITUACAO IN (1, 5, 6) AND L.CODFUNC IS NULL -- Filtra apenas quem NÃO tem registros na TFPFOL ORDER BY F.CPF, F.NOMEFUNC

grid.title: Vínculo Vazio
grid.expression: SELECT CODEMP,CODFUNC,NOMEFUNC,DTADM,DTDEM,VINCULO,SITUACAO,MATRICULA,MATRICULAOLD,CPF,SALBASE,REMUNBASE FROM TFPFUN WHERE VINCULO IS NULL AND SITUACAO IN (1,5,6)

grid.title: Salário Base Vazio
grid.expression: SELECT CODEMP,CODFUNC,NOMEFUNC,DTADM,DTDEM,VINCULO,SITUACAO,MATRICULA,MATRICULAOLD,CPF,REMUNBASE FROM TFPFUN WHERE SALBASE IS NULL AND SITUACAO IN (1,5,6)

grid.title: Salário Histórico x Salário Atual
grid.expression: SELECT F.CODEMP, F.CODFUNC, F.NOMEFUNC, F.CPF, F.SALBASE AS SALARIO_CADASTRO, B.SALBASE AS SALARIO_HISTORICO, B.REFERENCIA AS ULTIMA_REF_HISTORICO, (F.SALBASE - B.SALBASE) AS DIFERENCA FROM TFPFUN F INNER JOIN TFPBAS B ON F.CODEMP = B.CODEMP AND F.CODFUNC = B.CODFUNC WHERE B.REFERENCIA = ( -- Subconsulta para pegar a maior (última) data de referência do funcionário na TFPBAS SELECT MAX(REFERENCIA) FROM TFPBAS WHERE CODEMP = F.CODEMP AND CODFUNC = F.CODFUNC ) AND F.SALBASE <> B.SALBASE -- Filtra apenas onde os valores são diferentes ORDER BY F.NOMEFUNC

grid.title: Sem Linhas na TFPFER
grid.expression: SELECT F.CODEMP, F.CODFUNC, F.NOMEFUNC, F.VINCULO, F.SITUACAO, F.DTADM, F.MATRICULA FROM TFPFUN F WHERE F.SITUACAO = 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( -- Verifica se NÃO existe uma linha na TFPFER para este funcionário que esteja sem data de saída SELECT 1 FROM TFPFER E WHERE E.CODEMP = F.CODEMP AND E.CODFUNC = F.CODFUNC AND E.DTSAIDA IS NULL) ORDER BY F.NOMEFUNC

grid.title: Período de Férias Negativo
grid.expression: SELECT CODEMP,CODFUNC,DTINIAQUI,SEQUENCIA,DTFINAQUI,DTPREVISTA,DTSAIDA,NUMDIASFER,ATUALFERGOZ FROM TFPFER WHERE NUMDIASFER<=0

level.description: 226 - Eventos Com Índice em Média como Decimais

grid.title: Eventos Com Índice em Média como Decimais
grid.expression: SELECT F.CODEMP, F.CODFUNC, F.TIPFOLHA, F.REFERENCIA, F.CODEVENTO, E.DESCREVENTO, E.INCSOBREMEDIAS, F.SEQUENCIA, F.VLREVENTO, F.INDICE, F.INDICE AS ORIGINAL_DECIMAL, FLOOR(F.INDICE) + ((F.INDICE - FLOOR(F.INDICE)) * 0.60) AS SIMULACAO_SEXAGESIMAL FROM TFPFOL F INNER JOIN TFPEVE E ON F.CODEVENTO = E.CODEVENTO WHERE (F.INDICE - FLOOR(F.INDICE)) >= 0.60 AND E.INCSOBREMEDIAS = 'I' ORDER BY F.CODEMP, F.CODFUNC

grid.title: Acumulados Que Estão Decimal
grid.expression: SELECT A.CODEMP, A.CODFUNC, A.CODEVENTO, E.DESCREVENTO, E.INCSOBREMEDIAS, A.SEQUENCIA, A.ANO, A.INDJANEIRO, A.INDFEVEREIRO, A.INDMARCO, A.INDABRIL, A.INDMAIO, A.INDJUNHO, A.INDJULHO, A.INDAGOSTO, A.INDSETEMBRO, A.INDOUTUBRO, A.INDNOVEMBRO, A.INDDEZEMBRO FROM TFPACU A INNER JOIN TFPEVE E ON A.CODEVENTO = E.CODEVENTO WHERE E.INCSOBREMEDIAS = 'I' AND ( (A.INDJANEIRO - FLOOR(A.INDJANEIRO)) >= 0.60 OR (A.INDFEVEREIRO - FLOOR(A.INDFEVEREIRO)) >= 0.60 OR (A.INDMARCO - FLOOR(A.INDMARCO)) >= 0.60 OR (A.INDABRIL - FLOOR(A.INDABRIL)) >= 0.60 OR (A.INDMAIO - FLOOR(A.INDMAIO)) >= 0.60 OR (A.INDJUNHO - FLOOR(A.INDJUNHO)) >= 0.60 OR (A.INDJULHO - FLOOR(A.INDJULHO)) >= 0.60 OR (A.INDAGOSTO - FLOOR(A.INDAGOSTO)) >= 0.60 OR (A.INDSETEMBRO - FLOOR(A.INDSETEMBRO)) >= 0.60 OR (A.INDOUTUBRO - FLOOR(A.INDOUTUBRO)) >= 0.60 OR (A.INDNOVEMBRO - FLOOR(A.INDNOVEMBRO)) >= 0.60 OR (A.INDDEZEMBRO - FLOOR(A.INDDEZEMBRO)) >= 0.60 ) ORDER BY A.ANO DESC, A.CODEMP, A.CODFUNC

grid.title: Ocorrências Sem Dt. Final Preenchida
grid.expression: SELECT O.CODEMP, O.CODFUNC, O.NUOCOR, O.CODHISTOCOR, H.DESCRHISTOCOR, -- Descrição Oficial (do Cadastro de Históricos) O.DESCROCOR, -- Detalhe Específico (Digitado no lançamento) O.DTINICOCOR, O.DTFINALOCOR FROM TFPOCO O INNER JOIN TFPHIS H ON O.CODHISTOCOR = H.CODHISTOCOR WHERE O.DTFINALOCOR IS NULL ORDER BY O.CODEMP, O.CODFUNC, O.DTINICOCOR DESC
SELECT 'Em construção' AS MENSAGEM FROM DUAL
SELECT 'Em construção' AS MENSAGEM FROM DUAL

grid.title: Mapa Tributário de Serviços Gerais
grid.expression: SELECT C.NUNOTA, C.DTNEG, C.CODEMP, I.CODPROD AS COD_PROD, P.DESCRPROD, D.ALIQUOTA AS ALIQ_ISS, CASE I.CODTRIBISS WHEN 00 THEN 'TRIBUTADO' WHEN 01 THEN 'ISS RETIDO' WHEN 07 THEN 'NÃO TRIBUTADO' WHEN 06 THEN 'ISENTO' END AS INC_ISS, M.ALIQUOTA AS ALIQ_PIS, M2.ALIQUOTA AS ALIQ_COFINS, M3.ALIQUOTA AS ALIQ_CSLL, M4.ALIQUOTA AS ALIQ_IR, M5.ALIQUOTA AS ALIQ_INSS FROM TGFCAB C JOIN TTKNOT N ON N.NUNOTA = C.NUNOTA JOIN TSICID CID ON C.CODCIDPREST = CID.CODCID JOIN TGFITE I ON I.NUNOTA = C.NUNOTA JOIN TGFPRO P ON P.CODPROD = I.CODPROD LEFT JOIN TGFDIN D ON D.NUNOTA = I.NUNOTA AND I.SEQUENCIA = D.SEQUENCIA AND D.CODIMP = 4 LEFT JOIN TGFIMN M ON M.NUNOTA = I.NUNOTA AND I.SEQUENCIA = M.SEQUENCIA AND M.CODIMP = 2 LEFT JOIN TGFIMN M2 ON M2.NUNOTA = I.NUNOTA AND I.SEQUENCIA = M2.SEQUENCIA AND M2.CODIMP = 3 LEFT JOIN TGFIMN M3 ON M3.NUNOTA = I.NUNOTA AND I.SEQUENCIA = M3.SEQUENCIA AND M3.CODIMP = 4 LEFT JOIN TGFIMN M4 ON M4.NUNOTA = I.NUNOTA AND I.SEQUENCIA = M4.SEQUENCIA AND M4.CODIMP = 7 LEFT JOIN TGFIMN M5 ON M5.NUNOTA = I.NUNOTA AND I.SEQUENCIA = M5.SEQUENCIA AND M4.CODIMP = 6 WHERE C.CODTIPOPER = 1106

grid.title: Tributação do serviço - :A_COD_PROD
grid.expression: SELECT DISTINCT ISS.CODEMP, PRO.DESCRPROD, CID.NOMECID, ISS.PERCINSS, CASE ISS.CODTRIBISS WHEN 00 THEN 'TRIBUTADO' WHEN 01 THEN 'ISS RETIDO' WHEN 07 THEN 'NÃO TRIBUTADO' WHEN 06 THEN 'ISENTO' END AS INC_ISS, ISS.CODLST, M.ALIQUOTA AS ALIQ_PIS, M2.ALIQUOTA AS ALIQ_COFINS, M3.ALIQUOTA AS ALIQ_CSLL, M4.ALIQUOTA AS ALIQ_IR, M5.ALIQUOTA AS ALIQ_INSS FROM TGFPRO PRO JOIN TGFITE ITE ON ITE.CODPROD = PRO.CODPROD JOIN TGFISS ISS ON ISS.CODPROD = PRO.CODPROD JOIN TSICID CID ON CID.CODCID = ISS.CODCID JOIN TGFCAB CAB ON CAB.NUNOTA = ITE.NUNOTA JOIN TTKNOT NT ON NT.NUNOTA = CAB.NUNOTA LEFT JOIN TGFIMA M ON M.CODIGO = PRO.CODPROD AND M.CODIMP = 2 LEFT JOIN TGFIMA M2 ON M2.CODIGO = PRO.CODPROD AND M2.CODIMP = 3 LEFT JOIN TGFIMA M3 ON M3.CODIGO = PRO.CODPROD AND M3.CODIMP = 4 LEFT JOIN TGFIMA M4 ON M4.CODIGO = PRO.CODPROD AND M4.CODIMP = 7 LEFT JOIN TGFIMA M5 ON M5.CODIGO = PRO.CODPROD AND M4.CODIMP = 6 WHERE PRO.CODPROD = :A_COD_PROD ORDER BY ISS.CODEMP
